ogTitle: Naturi vs Neales Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Naturi and Neales Flat.
heading: Naturi vs Neales Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Naturi, South Australia and Neales Flat, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Neales Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Naturi (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Naturi or Neales Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Naturi has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Neales Flat scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Naturi scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Neales Flat scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Naturi or Neales Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Neales Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
